title: Soirée by Sephora
subtitle: Brand Launch Campaign | 2024

paragraphs: Campaign concept for Sephora's nightwear collection launch. Developed moodboard, brand narrative, and event concept for a premium evening experience targeting beauty enthusiasts and fashion-conscious consumers in Vietnam.
bullets: Positioned the collection around luxury self-care rituals, creating a 'Soirée' (evening party) concept
Transformed a product launch into an aspirational lifestyle moment
Developed moodboard and visual direction for the campaign
Designed KOL/influencer activation plan targeting beauty and fashion micro-influencers
Created social media content calendar aligned with launch timeline
Developed event concept and guest journey for the physical activation

campaign.name: Soirée by Sephora
campaign.objective: Launch Sephora's nightwear collection with a premium brand experience that differentiates in a competitive beauty retail market
campaign.target_audience: Beauty enthusiasts, fashion-conscious consumers, luxury self-care seekers in Vietnam
campaign.insight: Nightwear as a self-care ritual — a moment of personal indulgence that elevates everyday life
strategy: Position collection around luxury self-care rituals
Create 'Soirée' (evening party) narrative framing product launch as aspirational lifestyle
KOL/influencer activation with beauty and fashion creators
Premium event activation with curated guest journey
Social media content calendar building anticipation

design.typography: Elegant serif headings; refined sans-serif body

summary: Sephora 'Soirée' campaign concept for nightwear collection launch — positioned around luxury self-care rituals with premium event activation, KOL strategy, and aspirational lifestyle narrative.
